body_excerpt: In cd_parseMsg of cd_codec.c, there is a possible infinite loop due to improper input validation. This could lead to remote denial of service by a rogue cellular base station with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
